notes: Escort combat depth: you can now pick which system your pooled fire hits on every target — 🎯 Hull (full damage), 🔫 Weapons (blunt their return fire), 🛡️ Defenses (strip armor so your hits land harder) or 🚀 Engines. Cripple every attacker's engines and the convoy can break off and run to the next leg. And destroyed attackers now drop their bounty, credits and cargo — salvage on top of the contract fee.
